hmong.for_n_variables_the_table_has_2_rows_a: Rau n qhov hloov pauv, lub rooj muaj 2ⁿ kab. AND, OR, NOT, XOR, IFF — txhua lub rooj vag tsuas yog ib kem xwb. hmong.modus_ponens_modus_tollens_hypothetica: Modus ponens, modus tollens, syllogism yog tias, syllogism cais — yim txoj cai xav npog feem ntau ntawm logic ntawm cov lus theem pib. Txhua kauj ruam ua pov thawj nws tus kheej los ntawm LUB NPE, tsis yog los ntawm kev xav.

hmong.tautology_always_true_contradiction_al: Tautology = yeej tseeb; kev sib tsis haum = yeej cuav; kev tshwm sim = qee zaus ob qho. Aristotle txoj cai tsis sib tsis haum (350 BCE) yog txoj cai luam tawm qub tshaj plaws. AP CS Principles kev xyaum + lus qhia txog discrete math.

hmong.nand_is_functionally_complete_you_can_: NAND yog ua tau tiav txhij — koj tuaj yeem tsim txhua lub rooj vag los ntawm NAND nkaus xwb. Ib lub CPU niaj hnub no muaj ~10 billion transistors uas siv tib yam Boolean math uas koj tab tom tsim ntawm no.

hmong.p_and_q_each_carry_a_probability_inste: P thiab Q txhua tus nqa ib qho probability es tsis yog tseeb/cuav nyuaj. Rau cov xwm txheej ywj pheej, P(P∧Q) = P(P) × P(Q). Saib seb qhov kev ntseeg siab hloov cov probability mos mos ua cov kev xav cais li cas.
